description: A loading spinner appears in the sidebar where flight results are expected to load.
frame_description: The Google Explore page for Sicily is visible, with a loading spinner appearing in the sidebar.

description: The sidebar content updates to display flight options for Palermo and Catania.
frame_description: Flight results for Palermo and Catania appear in the sidebar.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the Palermo flight card in the sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the Palermo flight card in the sidebar.

description: The user clicks on the Palermo flight card to view specific flight options.
frame_description: The user clicks on the Palermo flight card.

description: The sidebar content transitions to show details for Palermo, initially displaying a loading skeleton.
frame_description: A loading skeleton appears in the sidebar as it transitions to show Palermo details.

description: The flight details for Palermo, including airline options and prices, are fully loaded in the sidebar.
frame_description: Flight details for Palermo are fully loaded in the sidebar.

description: The user scrolls down the sidebar to browse through the available flight options for Palermo.
frame_description: The user begins scrolling down the list of flight options in the sidebar.

description: The user clicks on the 'Prices are currently typical' section in the sidebar.
frame_description: The user clicks on the price information section in the sidebar.

description: The price information section expands to show more details about current flight prices.
The user hovers over the Turkish Airlines flight option before deciding to click.
frame_description: The cursor hovers over a Turkish Airlines flight option.

description: The user clicks on the Turkish Airlines flight option, which triggers a navigation to a new tab.
frame_description: The user clicks on the Turkish Airlines flight option.

description: The browser navigates to a new tab showing Google Flights for the selected route (Melbourne to Palermo).
frame_description: A new tab opens and begins loading the Google Flights page.

description: The flight results list and filters fully render on the Google Flights page.
frame_description: The Google Flights page has loaded its main content and results.

description: The user hovers over the flight results on the Google Flights page, examining the options.
frame_description: The cursor hovers over the flight results on the Google Flights page.

description: The user clicks on the 'Prices are currently typical' information box to see more details.
frame_description: The user clicks on the price information box on the Google Flights page.

description: The price information section expands, showing a price history graph and additional context.
frame_description: The price information section expands on the Google Flights page.
